generated_oml:
// --------------------------- Sensing Components ---------------------------
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino‑connected swing‑angle encoder that measures the crane’s pendulum angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino‑connected anemometer that measures ambient wind speed around the crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

// --------------------------- Data Transmitted ---------------------------
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

// --------------------------- Data Instances ---------------------------
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped swing‑angle measurement (degrees) from the encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped wind‑speed measurement (m/s) from the anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AnemometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

// --------------------------- Models ---------------------------
instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model representing the geometry of the lab‑scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADModelEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical kinematic model describing crane motion and swing dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicModelEnabler
]

// --------------------------- Enablers ---------------------------
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time‑series database used to store sensor, actuator and logged data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService,
                     ContinuousValidationService,
                     SimulationService,
                     TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                     MonitoringService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker that routes real‑time messages among services"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService,
                     ContinuousValidationService,
                     DataVisualizationService,
                     OptimalControlService,
                     MonitoringService
]

instance KinematicModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software component that exposes the crane kinematic model to consuming services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                     SimulationService,
                     OptimalControlService
]

instance CADModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component that provides the CAD geometry to visualization services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance DockerContainerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerisation platform (Docker) used to deploy all service containers"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService,
                     HistoricalDataLoggingService,
                     DataVisualizationService,
                     ContinuousValidationService,
                     MonitoringService,
                     TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                     SimulationService
]

// --------------------------- Services ---------------------------
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal motion commands using the kinematic model and transmits them to the crane controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight,
                     TransmitControlCommandAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously writes timestamped sensor and actuator states into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight,
                     StoreDataAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Renders the crane’s pose, sensor streams and CAD geometry in real time via Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight,
                     VisualizeStateAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares live sensor data with simulated trajectories to detect anomalies and raises alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight,
                     AlertDashboardAction
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time observation of the crane’s state for operators and researchers"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight,
                     ObserveStateAction
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal, swing‑free trajectories based on the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight,
                     GenerateTrajectoryAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Emulates crane behavior for given trajectories using the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight,
                     SimulateTrajectoryAction
]

// --------------------------- Insights ---------------------------
instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides optimal control commands for the crane based on model‑based optimisation"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Records and preserves historical sensor and actuator data for analysis"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Displays the crane’s current pose and sensor readings in real time"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detects deviations between live data and simulated trajectories indicating faults"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies fault conditions from validation results and informs operators"
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Offers continuous, real‑time observation of crane state for stakeholders"
]

// --------------------------- Actions ---------------------------
instance TransmitControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sends computed motion commands to the physical crane controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StoreDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Writes incoming sensor/actuator measurements into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizeStateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates the Grafana dashboard with the latest crane pose and data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AlertDashboardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Publishes an MQTT alert to the dashboard when a validation threshold is exceeded"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GenerateTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Produces a swing‑free trajectory plan for a requested move"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ObserveStateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuously streams the crane’s state to monitoring clients"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulateTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Runs a simulation of the crane following a given trajectory"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// --------------------------- Environment & Physical Component ---------------------------
instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCraneComponent,
                     SwingAngleEncoder,
                     Anemometer
]

instance PhysicalCraneComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab‑scale gantry crane with motor‑driven carriage, controller unit and interchangeable pucks"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application, implemented in Python, receives trajectory commands from the Trajectory Generator Service. It translates the optimal trajectory into low‑level motion commands and sends them to the Physical Crane Interface, which communicates with the crane’s motor controllers (via the Arduino) to drive cart movement and hoisting. The command flow is bi‑directional: after each command the crane reports its updated state, which is logged as described above. No explicit command format, authentication or conflict‑resolution mechanisms are detailed in the documents."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The lab‑scale gantry crane twin operates in (near) real‑time: a Logging Application continuously streams the crane’s state to a TimescaleDB database, and the Continuous Validation Service continuously compares measured trajectories with those simulated by the Simulation Service, generating alerts via the Grafana dashboard when a threshold is exceeded. No explicit synchronization interval or latency bound is specified in the documentation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The overall orchestration follows a container‑based architecture described with the C4 model. Core components are implemented in Python and communicate via an MQTT broker for event‑driven signaling. Persistent data are stored in a TimescaleDB instance, visualized in Grafana. The Trajectory‑Generator produces optimal motion plans, the Simulation Service evaluates them, and the Continuous Validation Service assesses deviation, all orchestrated by the MQTT broker and the shared database, constituting a tightly coupled, service‑oriented constellation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured by a Continuous Validation Service that continuously compares the measurements of executed trajectories (obtained from the physical crane) with the corresponding simulated trajectories generated by the Simulation Service. The service computes distance metrics between the two data streams, checks them against a predefined acceptable threshold, and triggers operator alerts via the Grafana dashboard when the threshold is breached. This validation loop provides ongoing verification of the kinematic model’s accuracy and enables detection and correction of modeling errors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication relies on an MQTT broker (Eclipse Mosquitto) for publish/subscribe signaling and on PostgreSQL‑compatible SQL connections to the TimescaleDB database. All Dockerized components (TimescaleDB, MQTT broker, Grafana dashboard) run on the same host machine and communicate over the host’s loopback network. The Python services communicate locally via the MQTT broker and direct database connections. No specific bandwidth, latency, redundancy or security protocols beyond the use of MQTT and standard database authentication are mentioned."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The entire system is deployed on a single personal computer. Docker containers host the TimescaleDB database, the Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker, and the Grafana dashboard, orchestrated with a docker‑compose file. The remaining services (Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation) are provided as a Python package (gantrylib) installed with pip and run as standard processes on the host. Deployment is therefore on‑premise, with scalability limited to the resources of the host PC; the open‑source components allow replication on any comparable hardware."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external software is achieved through standard open protocols: state data are published to the TimescaleDB using its native SQL/TSDB interface, real‑time messages are exchanged over MQTT, and visualisation is provided through Grafana dashboards. No explicit enterprise‑level standards (e.g., AutomationML) are used in this exemplar, and the twin does not depend on external cloud platforms; all components run locally on the provided virtual‑machine images."
]
